title: Golden Valley Electric Association Partnering with Westinghouse for Department of Energy Long Duration Energy Storage Demonstration Project
summary: This week, Golden Valley Electric Association (GVEA) and Westinghouse Electric Company (Westinghouse) were notified by the Department of Energy (DOE) that a proposed project to deploy a Long-Duration Energy Storage (LDES) system in Healy, Alaska, was selected for a $50 million grant.
